description: A company (not a party to the lawsuit) receives a subpoena for documents. In-house counsel must manage the response.

nodes.task_description: Review the subpoena to understand what documents are being requested and the deadline for production.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the scope of the request.

nodes.task_description: Draft and serve objections to the subpoena if it is overly broad or seeks confidential information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent prepares legal objections to narrow the scope of the subpoena.

nodes.task_description: Gather, review, and produce all non-privileged, responsive documents.

expected_outcome.value: The company complies with its legal obligations under the subpoena.
